description_long: This object consists of two pieces of tamago nigiri sushi, each featuring a rectangular slice of yellow tamago (Japanese sweet omelette) placed atop a compact mound of white sushi rice. The tamago and rice are held together by a dark green strip of nori (seaweed) wrapped around the center of each piece. Both pieces are neatly arranged side by side on a light-colored, rectangular wooden serving board with a smooth finish. The rice grains are individually textured, and the tamago has a slightly glossy, soft appearance. There are no visible garnishes or additional toppings, and the presentation is clean and minimalist.
description: Two pieces of tamago nigiri sushi with yellow omelette and nori on white rice, served on a wooden board. The presentation is clean and simple, with no visible garnishes.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both pieces of tamago nigiri sushi side by side on a wooden board, highlighting the nori wrap and the layered tamago.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the length of the tamago slices and the thickness of the nori strips, with the sushi pieces aligned on the board.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the sushi pieces, with the rice mounds and nori strips clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tamago's surface texture and the even placement of the sushi on the wooden board.
